prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training - high-intensity endurance athlete requiring 3000+ calories with carbohydrate loading and hydration strategies

solution_criteria: Meal plan totals 3000+ calories with carbohydrate emphasis (55-65% of total calories)
Includes specific hydration strategy with fluid intake recommendations throughout the day
Provides 4-5 meals/snacks distributed across the day for sustained energy
Compact format suitable for quick reference during training day
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-intensity endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring 3000+ calories with emphasis on carbohydrate loading and hydration strategies

prompt_inputs.goal: Maximize strength and power gains with optimized meal timing around weightlifting training

solution_criteria: Meal plan spans exactly 1 day with 4-5 meals
Protein intake is high (minimum 2.0g per kg bodyweight) and distributed across meals
Pre-training and post-training meals are strategically timed to support performance and recovery
Macronutrient ratios emphasize protein while maintaining adequate carbohydrates and fats for a strength athlete
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) with specific macronutrient ratios (high protein) and meal timing around training windows

prompt_inputs.goal: Optimize performance and recovery for evening soccer match with proper pre-game, mid-day recovery, and hydration timing

solution_criteria: Includes 4-5 meals/snacks strategically timed for pre-game (3-4 hours before), mid-day recovery, and match preparation
Incorporates adequate carbohydrates for energy and protein for muscle recovery appropriate for 78kg athlete
Provides hydration and electrolyte guidance aligned with match timing
Meal plan is compact and presented in a single day format
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport-specific athlete (professional soccer player) including pre-game nutrition timing, mid-day recovery meals, and performance optimization for evening match
